{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323190422ECBB10F79786F28F87F0\"}"},"total":197},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7095177319425475332","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事情节，紧扣故事人物发展，历史年代清晰，贴合历史时代背景，主要历史事件清楚……值得观看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1651974740,"group_id":"6932063146542631949","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"作者小白，第一次尝试写文，会接受大家的建议","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5kgn4t1E+UqDwO0kbg3HF8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/173edba0ee604fb99fce031564efa4b3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788429\u0026x-signature=TY9z4N2R3YEctnvHHyF0mMJdpis%3D","user_id":"87215644659","user_name":"初冬心事"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"87215644659","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6932063146542631949","book_info":{"abstract":"这是个人的奋斗史，更是一个民族的奋斗史。谁说大宋积弱？历史系研究生宋飞扬穿越到北宋初年，成为了赵匡胤第四子赵德芳。自此开始，改变了大宋的国运。下南唐，伏北汉，复我燕云十六州，重新一统中华大地。辽国尽成大宋牧马之地。重新经营西域，开拓海上丝绸之路。四方臣服，再现汉唐雄风。国强民富，大宋成为国中最强者。强宋之路，更是民族复兴之路。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/184a642e6761ede6c013318e040bb69d","author":"一叶落秋","author_id":"","book_id":"6932063146542631949","book_name":"强宋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1878人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6932095869944597518","read_count":"1878","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"609472"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"268","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/c1fa016fa37f7985dc120879f604115b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779447862\u0026x-signature=iJwSKbmBjXbjnTkTh3GrPmWQgh8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.6656591e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323190422ECBB10F79786F28F87F0\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86656,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2407},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7031115347054986024","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级精彩，故事情节紧凑。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1637059113,"group_id":"6932063146542631949","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书中自有黄金房","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+gu4fdJd/vkrxGsjwlWgRWdR50t3VBoKp4qyUWupBxI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=s
